reviews.comment:
La carga de NAFTA, buena como en las otras YPF del país, aunque no tenían infinia. El local para comprar bebida y comida, bien también. Los baños, tanto de hombres como de mujeres, estaban sucios. Si pasa por la zona y necesitan estación de servicio, hay otras mejores opciones.

(Translated by Google)
The gasoline was good, like at other YPF stations across the country, although they didn't have Infinia. The convenience store was also good. The restrooms, both men's and women's, were dirty. If you're passing through the area and need a gas station, there are better options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBZ3RiM0t3EAE

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBXzdqUkJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención, pero en horario dónde está muy concurrido se nota que falta personal en la playa. La estación está en buen estado y los precios son los mismos que en la mayoría de las YPF. Recomendado para los socios del Automóvil Club Argentino por el descuento del 5%.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, but during peak hours it's noticeable that they're understaffed at the pumps. The station is in good condition and the prices are the same as at most YPF stations. Recommended for members of the Automóvil Club Argentino (Argentine Automobile Club) for the 5% discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3eXBMd0RBEAE
